settings.heading: Wholesale & Bulk Orders
settings.content: GlobiSun wholesale orders start at $500 USD before shipping and taxes. Minimums, bulk pricing, package options, and lead time depend on quantity, supplier availability, carton weight, destination ZIP code, and timeline. Smaller sample requests may be reviewed case by case through the quote form.

settings.heading: Best For
settings.content: Classrooms, art studios, workshops, camps, creative programs, small retailers, and project-based visual teams.
